untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic equal-weighted market index calculation and position sizing proportional to relative deviation from market return. This requires cross-sectional comparison logic and custom aggregation not expressible in the allowed three-field condition format. The strategy needs: (1) real-time computation of equal-weighted market index across all stocks, (2) per-stock deviation calculation from that index, (3) weight normalization by stock count. These operations are portfolio-level constructs requiring custom engine support beyond single-stock indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to represent the mean reversion concept using individual stock returns versus zero (proxy for market neutral), but this loses the critical cross-sectional logic that defines the strategy. The true signal requires: stock_return vs equal_weighted_market_return (deviation-based), then normalized portfolio weighting. Recommend implementing as a custom composite signal handler in the backtest engine.
